name: BB스퀴즈탈출
python_code:
period = 20
mult_bb = 2.0
mult_kc = 1.5
bb_up = BBandsUp(period, mult_bb)
bb_low = BBandsDown(period, mult_bb)
kc_up = EMA(C, period) + ATR(period) * mult_kc
kc_low = EMA(C, period) - ATR(period) * mult_kc
is_sq = (bb_up < kc_up) & (bb_low > kc_low)
cond = (is_sq.shift(1)) & (bb_up > kc_up) & ((C.shift(1) <= bb_up.shift(1)) & (C > bb_up))
